'''Tantiss Station''' was a [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] node destroyed by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]. It was located in the [[Dalonbian sector/Legends|Dalonbian sector]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' {{1st}}
